name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: Smeared and silenced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

It didn't take long for the Washington Machine to go on the attack after I released my tax plan to drive a stake through the heart of the IRS and blow up the tax code.

But I will NOT back down, and I will NOT let our national media get away with the same ugly SMEARS they used to destroy Republican candidates in the past.

**[Can I count on you to help me fight back by chipping in $20.16 before the June 30th fundraising deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28636231:27505596928:m:1:879035888:E72D16ADD25FE6F32F934ABE88EAB0DA:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, I plan to fight the Washington Machine with everything I've got.

And I explain step one of my plan in this special video about my proposal to enact the largest tax cut in American history.

The June 30th fundraising deadline is the final deadline before the presidential debates begin.

So it's critical I have a strong showing.

Left-wing debate "moderators" are sure to twist and distort my words in their desperate attempt to smear my campaign.

A big quarter can give my campaign the head of steam we need headed into the presidential debates.

**[So take a moment to watch the video about my"Fair and Flat Tax" plan -- and then please chip in $20.16 before the upcoming June 30th deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28636231:27505596928:m:1:879035888:E72D16ADD25FE6F32F934ABE88EAB0DA:r)**.

name: Ben Carson
subject: Peter, will you help me celebrate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28642616:27509192667:m:1:876315805:EDF39C68A36502948BD30B9C4E6AAA21:r)
---
|

Peter,

July 6 is a huge milestone for me and Candy. It's our 40th wedding anniversary, and we have been trying to figure out how best to celebrate in the midst of a presidential campaign.

So when my staff told me they'd be throwing a party for us in New Hampshire, I was thrilled.

**Now, I'd like to offer you and a friend the opportunity to join us as our special guests.**

[**You can automatically enter this exciting new contest by donating $5 or more right now. ****June 30 is the last chance to enter, so I hope you'll do so as soon as possible.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28642616:27509192667:m:1:876315805:EDF39C68A36502948BD30B9C4E6AAA21:r)

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28642616:27509192667:m:1:876315805:EDF39C68A36502948BD30B9C4E6AAA21:r)
---
Contests like this not only allow me the opportunity to spend time with some of my most loyal supporters, but they help us to raise the resources necessary to be successful.

This campaign is hard work, but that doesn't mean it can't be fun, and it would be a real honor for you and a guest to join me on such a special day.

[**So please, take a moment now to enter our contest by making a donation of $5 or more, and hopefully I'll see you in New Hampshire very soon.**
](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28642616:27509192667:m:1:876315805:EDF39C68A36502948BD30B9C4E6AAA21:r)
Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS CONTEST** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this contest. You may enter contest without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28642617:27509192667:m:1:876315805:EDF39C68A36502948BD30B9C4E6AAA21:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "40th ANNIVERSARY CELEBRATION" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28642618:27509192667:m:1:876315805:EDF39C68A36502948BD30B9C4E6AAA21:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to New Hampshire, transportation, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This contest is sponsored by Carson America. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

name: Elizabeth Conatser, Finance Director, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: FWD:: One Week
body:
Friend, I know I have asked for your help before, but your help today is critical. Did you see Senator Graham's important email from earlier this week?

Our campaign's first -- and most critical -- financial deadline is on Tuesday, and we need your immediate support to ensure we report the strongest numbers possible.

Won't you please read his email below and [**donate as generously as you can to our campaign?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630099:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r)

We're counting on you. Thanks so much.

Sincerely,

Elizabeth Conatser
Finance Director

* * *

| |

---
---
|
Friend,

It is hard to believe it's already been three weeks since I announced my campaign for president. With just one week remaining in June, the hardest work may still be to come.

**Friend, we only have seven days before our first critical End of Quarter Deadline.**

You see, a lot is riding on the numbers we report. My opponents will view it as a sign of the strength our campaign has, and the liberal media will use it as a barometer to measure the support we have.

**[Can I count on you right now, Friend? Will you please chip in $15, $25, $50 or more to help guarantee we are able to post strong numbers?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630099:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r)**

| [** Donate $5 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630100:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r) | [** Donate $10 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630101:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r)
---|---
[** Donate $25 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630102:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r) | [** Donate $50 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630103:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r)
[** Donate $75 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630104:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r) | [** Donate $100 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630105:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r)
[** Donate $250 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630106:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r) | [** Donate $500 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630107:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r)

I know I have asked for your help before, but your help today is critical.

Please follow this link to give as generously as you can to our campaign.

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. In order to ensure the strongest fundraising totals possible before the End of Quarter deadline, I need your urgent financial support. **[Will you please chip in as much as you can afford by following this link?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630099:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r)** Thank you.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28630099:27509572054:m:1:877327319:334AAE3C830AFE0FDD100557890C8B64:r)

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Supreme Court just ruled:
body:
[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rkwfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbsvrjn_qfpgghdn.html)

Friend,

**The Supreme Court just upheld Obamacare yet again.**

This is the direct result of President Obama. **He deliberately forced ObamaCare on the American people** **in a partisan and toxic way**.

And we both know that Hillary Clinton will be more of the same. We cannot let this happen**.

[That is why I need you to make a one time - emergency contribution of $50, $25, or $10 to my campaign to ensure that NEVER happens.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cgmrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsldhg_qfpgghdn.html)**

Friend, you know in your heart that we cannot afford four more years of the same policies, which will be the case under a Clinton White House. [**But the only way to prevent that is to make the most generous contribution you can afford right now to stop her.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jvshctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkpmrsv_qfpgghdn.html)

And here is my promise to you. **As President, I will uphold our Constitution, I will not compromise my duty to you or the American people.

We need a President who will repeal and replace ObamaCare with a conservative solution.**

[**So join me today, and ensure we put a stop to Hillary Clinton and the overreaches of the last six years.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/unhbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjfqyf_qfpgghdn.html)

Thank you,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mnqgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjdqwb_qfpgghdn.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: I'm mad I even have to write this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

Like so many Americans today, I'm angry. I'm angry I even have to write the following words:

This morning, the United States Supreme Court announced it was once again REFUSING to strike a blow against ObamaCare.

Ignoring the plain language of the law, the Court upheld ObamaCare subsidies in states that have refused to set up exchanges -- just like when they effectively rewrote the law to rule the individual mandate Constitutional in 2012.

As President, I will fight for full-fledged, 100% REPEAL.

**[With the June 30th End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline rapidly approaching, I'm counting on you to help me send a message to the Washington Machine that ObamaCare's days are numbered with your most generous gift today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28649198:27514745155:m:1:879035888:2E239F907C9019BDC56F623EE905B495:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, depending on the courts to finally wipe this outrageous federal law off the books has failed.

I know there are those in the media and in my own Republican Party saying we should wave the white flag on ObamaCare.

As a practicing physician for 18 years, I can't tell you how much the ObamaCare issue gets under my skin.

The American people were told, "if you like your health insurance, you can keep it."

We were told it would be popular -- as soon as the American people found out what a great deal it was.

Instead, millions of Americans have lost their health insurance.

Millions more have seen their premiums skyrocket.

Meanwhile, hospitals are closing their doors and small businesses are breaking under the weight of all the new costs and regulations.

Some experts are predicting even higher ObamaCare rates in 2016.

And over the next decade, ObamaCare is set to send taxes soaring by $1.2 TRILLION!

Is it any wonder that the Washington Post reports that our economy is "grinding nearly to a halt?"

I believe the American people want full-fledged, 100% REPEAL of ObamaCare.

Not a quick fix. Not another scheme to just kick the can down the road.

But with the June 30th FEC fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, I'm counting on your support.

**[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28649198:27514745155:m:1:879035888:2E239F907C9019BDC56F623EE905B495:r)**.

Your generosity will help me mobilize millions more Americans to join with you and me in the fight to finally wipe ObamaCare off the books.

So please agree to your most generous contribution right away.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28649198:27514745155:m:1:879035888:2E239F907C9019BDC56F623EE905B495:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?june-30&sr=rhf062515n1")
**Contributed to End of Quarter Money Bomb?**
**## NO DONATION ##******
---

clean_body: Dear Fellow Conservative: Like so many Americans today, I'm angry. I'm angry I even have to write the following words: This morning, the United States Supreme Court announced it was once again REFUSING to strike a blow against ObamaCare. Ignoring the plain language of the law, the Court upheld ObamaCare subsidies in states that have refused to set up exchanges -- just like when they effectively rewrote the law to rule the individual mandate Constitutional in 2012. As President, I will fight for full-fledged, 100% REPEAL. . Fellow Conservative, depending on the courts to finally wipe this outrageous federal law off the books has failed. I know there are those in the media and in my own Republican Party saying we should wave the white flag on ObamaCare. As a practicing physician for 18 years, I can't tell you how much the ObamaCare issue gets under my skin. The American people were told, "if you like your health insurance, you can keep it." We were told it would be popular -- as soon as the American people found out what a great deal it was. Instead, millions of Americans have lost their health insurance. Millions more have seen their premiums skyrocket. Meanwhile, hospitals are closing their doors and small businesses are breaking under the weight of all the new costs and regulations. Some experts are predicting even higher ObamaCare rates in 2016. And over the next decade, ObamaCare is set to send taxes soaring by $1.2 TRILLION! Is it any wonder that the Washington Post reports that our economy is "grinding nearly to a halt?" I believe the American people want full-fledged, 100% REPEAL of ObamaCare. Not a quick fix. Not another scheme to just kick the can down the road. But with the June 30th FEC fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, I'm counting on your support. . Your generosity will help me mobilize millions more Americans to join with you and me in the fight to finally wipe ObamaCare off the books. So please agree to your most generous contribution right away. | ** "" Contributed to End of Quarter Money Bomb? NO DONATION ##**** | In Liberty, Rand Paul Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-27514745155-echo3-50568AFCAE6A5563C5974ABDB3FDF638@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Today the Supreme Court had its say
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Today, the Supreme Court had its say; soon, the American people will have theirs.

**And you can[make your voice heard](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/ClickThru.aspx?pubids=393%7c77308%7c828930%7c635435&digest=ywcKHljt1%2f6j8JcrQZrZtA&sysid=1) now.**

[](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/ClickThru.aspx?pubids=393%7c77309%7c828930%7c635435&digest=bE6hPCVzIbJPBr3qOEiJYA&sysid=1)

President Obama and Hillary Clinton would like this to be the end of the debate on Obamacare, but it isn't.

Republicans must outline a clear and coherent vision for health care to win the trust of the American people to repeal Obamacare.

**I am the only candidate for President who has put forward a comprehensive plan to do it.

If you believe we need to repeal and replace Obamacare, then [show me you're with me](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/ClickThru.aspx?pubids=393%7c77300%7c828930%7c635435&digest=Xa8ewumLdv6brChNAK1%2bhg&sysid=1).
**
[](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/ClickThru.aspx?pubids=393%7c77309%7c828930%7c635435&digest=bE6hPCVzIbJPBr3qOEiJYA&sysid=1)

**[Your generous contribution of $100, $50, or $25 will help me share my plan to repeal and replace Obamacare all across America.](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/ClickThru.aspx?pubids=393%7c77301%7c828930%7c635435&digest=BGE2O0lHA9NVdbvSy15i5Q&sysid=1)**

Conservatives must be **fearless** in demanding that our leaders in Washington repeal and replace Obamacare with a plan that will lower health care costs and restore freedom.

**I'm the only candidate for President with a plan to do it.[Stand with me today.](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/ClickThru.aspx?pubids=393%7c77302%7c828930%7c635435&digest=xIQ%2fxtvJOxENve2pjaOLMg&sysid=1)**

Thanks,
Bobby

PAID FOR BY JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT
---

P.O. BOX 5101, BATON ROUGE, LA 70821

[Click here to no longer receive email updates.](http://click.bsftransmit7.com/OptOut.aspx?pubids=393%7c6501%7c828930%7c635435&digest=%2fRdC9p9sov3DZzPJ5YGNxA&sysid=1)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Health care is a basic right
body:
#
**[Add your name if you agree that the only long-term health care solution for America is a Medicare-for-all single-payer system.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21e6/43f17890/5f094a6f/621da429/862697609/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/medicare-for-all?source=em150625a-medicare-for-all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=health-care&utm_content=aca-ruling")**
Friend -

Today, because of the Supreme Court's decision to protect the modest gains made under the Affordable Care Act, it is a good day for millions of Americans who will be able to keep their access to health care.

It's also a good day for the small business owners who, before the passage of the Affordable Care Act, couldn't afford the escalating cost of providing insurance for their employees.

**But while I am glad the Supreme Court upheld the law, in my view, the only long-term solution to America's health care crisis is a Medicare-for-all single-payer system.**

I start my approach to health care from two very simple premises:

1\. Health care must be recognized as a right, not a privilege -- every man, woman and child in our country should be able to access quality care regardless of their income.

2\. We must create a national system to provide care for every single American in the most cost-effective way possible.

Tragically, the United States fails in both areas.

The health insurance lobbyists and big pharmaceutical companies make "national health care" sound scary. It's not.

In fact, a large single-payer system already exists in the United States. It's called Medicare and the people enrolled give it high marks. More importantly, it has succeeded in providing near-universal coverage to Americans over age 65 in a very cost-effective manner.

It's time to expand that program to all Americans.

**[If we are serious about providing high-quality, affordable care as a right for all Americans, the only solution to this crisis is a Medicare-for-all single-payer system. Add your name to our petition if you agree.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21e6/43f17890/5f094a6f/621da429/862697609/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/medicare-for-all?source=em150625a-medicare-for-all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=health-care&utm_content=aca-ruling")**

The American people understand that our current health care system is not working.

They understand that the profiteering of the pharmaceutical industry and private insurance companies causes the United States to spend more per capita on health care than any other nation, while our life expectancy, infant mortality and preventable deaths outcomes are worse than most other countries.

We should be spending our money on care and disease prevention, not paper-pushing and debt collection. But the simple truth is that our efforts to eliminate waste and profiteering are endangered by these powerful corporate interests.

A single-payer system will expand employment and lift a major financial weight off of businesses burdened by employee health expenses. And the millions of Americans stuck in jobs they don't like, they would be free to explore more productive opportunities as they desire.

I attempted to offer a single-payer amendment during the Affordable Care Act debate, but my efforts were blocked.

But our time will come.

**[Add your name to mine if you agree it's time for America to adopt a Medicare-for-all single-payer health care system.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21e6/43f17890/5f094a6f/621da429/862697609/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/medicare-for-all?source=em150625a-medicare-for-all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=health-care&utm_content=aca-ruling")**

I am convinced today more than ever before that universal quality health care as a right will eventually become the law of the land. It is the only way forward.
Thank you for adding your name to mine,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21e6/43f17890/5f094a6f/621da3d6/862697609/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150625a-medicare-for-all")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21e6/43f17890/5f094a6f/621da3d7/862697609/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21e6/43f17890/5f094a6f/621da3d4/862697609/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: BREAKING: King v. Burwell decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| The Supreme Court made the right decision on healthcare. Friend -- Today, millions of Floridians can rest easy knowing that the critical funding they need for their health care coverage will remain in place. Approximately 1.3 million Floridians depend on this federal assistance. While today's decision is good news, our fight for healthcare isn't over. Florida's legislature and Governor Rick Scott need to put families first and expand Medicaid. I'll keep pushing for this every step of the way. [**Can I count on you in the days and weeks ahead as we continue to fight for healthcare for all of Florida's families? Make a donation today. >>**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae205b/738133e4/396d0fc5/7f9dc0f9/3003111988/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-june2015?refcode=ema_2015-06-25_Post-Burwell_ldnd") Thank you for your continued support. Patrick | **[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Stand with me on health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Friend --

This morning, the Supreme Court sided with common sense and America's families, and confirmed again that the Affordable Care Act is the law of land -- and it's here to stay.

This ruling is a victory for every American, especially the millions whose lives have been improved by health care reform and the countless more who fought hard to pass and protect this law. It's a reminder that while progress never comes easy, if we keep working, keep pushing, and never, ever give up, anything is possible.

Add your name if you agree that access to health care is a basic human right:

http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI5MTkxODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyNDcwMTI1S0&mt=1&rt=0

Despite two clear rulings by the highest court in the land, Republicans running for president still want to take basic health security away from millions of Americans.

They’re in lockstep with allies in Congress who have voted more than 50 times to repeal or dismantle the Affordable Care Act without proposing a single viable alternative.

The next president will either protect and expand health care for every American, or undo the progress we’ve made.

If you believe we need to keep fighting, join me:

http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI5MTkxODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyNDcwMTI1S0&mt=1&rt=0

Health care reform was a hard-fought battle -- congratulations to everyone who played a part in this win.

Thank you,

Hillary

***************

PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA

Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI5MTkxODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyNDcwMTI1S0&mt=1&rt=0

Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

Privacy Policy: http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI5MTkxODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=2&j=NTgyNDcwMTI1S0&mt=1&rt=0

name: Jessica Ennis, MarcoRubio.com
subject: State by state (June edition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter--

Four states play a critical early role in the
presidential nominating process: Iowa, New Hampshire, South
Carolina, and Nevada. Already, our campaign has made great
progress in building teams on the ground and meeting with voters.
Here's a quick snapshot of our work on the ground - made possible
thanks to your support.

Jessica Ennis
Political Director
Marco Rubio for President

Click here to forward this update to a friend.

Since launching our campaign in April, Marco has already
made two visits to the Hawkeye State. Our state chairman, Senator
Jack Whitver is leading a growing team on the ground and Marco is
drawing larger crowds with every visit. In April, Jack hosted a
house party in support of Marco at his home in Ankeny. Marco has
made other visits to Ames, Boone, and Des Moines, and will be
back in the state soon.

Marco was in the Granite State today and participated in
a veterans event and hosted a town hall meeting. In May, he spoke
at the First in the Nation Summit, went door knocking with Dennis
Green for his special election for state representative, and
attended a house party in Manchester.

In the Palmetto State, Team Marco continues to thrive --
last week we announced two co-chairs for the state: Rep. Nathan
Ballentine and Rep. Neal Collins. Last month, Marco spoke to a
packed house at Cong. Jeff Duncan's SC Freedom Summit, met with
faith and business leaders, and shook hands with voters at
Greenville's Artisphere festival. All of Team Marco's thoughts
are with the strong people of South Carolina as the state
continues to heal and come together at this time.

Lieutenant Governor Mark Hutchison leads our team in the
Silver State, where Marco celebrated his birthday last month.
During our most recent visit to Nevada, Marco met with grassroots
leaders, hosted a roundtable with technology entrepreneurs, and
attended a house party in Reno. Marco spent part of his childhood
in Las Vegas, where his father worked as a bartender in a casino
and his mother as a hotel maid, so there's a lot of pressure on
Team Marco Nevada!

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

clean_body: Peter-- Four states play a critical early role in the presidential nominating process: Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada. Already, our campaign has made great progress in building teams on the ground and meeting with voters. Here's a quick snapshot of our work on the ground - made possible thanks to your support. Jessica Ennis Political Director Marco Rubio for President Click here to forward this update to a friend. Since launching our campaign in April, Marco has already made two visits to the Hawkeye State. Our state chairman, Senator Jack Whitver is leading a growing team on the ground and Marco is drawing larger crowds with every visit. In April, Jack hosted a house party in support of Marco at his home in Ankeny. Marco has made other visits to Ames, Boone, and Des Moines, and will be back in the state soon. Marco was in the Granite State today and participated in a veterans event and hosted a town hall meeting. In May, he spoke at the First in the Nation Summit, went door knocking with Dennis Green for his special election for state representative, and attended a house party in Manchester. In the Palmetto State, Team Marco continues to thrive -- last week we announced two co-chairs for the state: Rep. Nathan Ballentine and Rep. Neal Collins. Last month, Marco spoke to a packed house at Cong. Jeff Duncan's SC Freedom Summit, met with faith and business leaders, and shook hands with voters at Greenville's Artisphere festival. All of Team Marco's thoughts are with the strong people of South Carolina as the state continues to heal and come together at this time. Lieutenant Governor Mark Hutchison leads our team in the Silver State, where Marco celebrated his birthday last month. During our most recent visit to Nevada, Marco met with grassroots leaders, hosted a roundtable with technology entrepreneurs, and attended a house party in Reno. Marco spent part of his childhood in Las Vegas, where his father worked as a bartender in a casino and his mother as a hotel maid, so there's a lot of pressure on Team Marco Nevada! name: Ann O'Leary, Hillary for America
subject: The GOP isn’t giving up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Defend health care reform. | Friend --

Here’s what Jeb Bush had to say about the Supreme Court’s decision to uphold the Affordable Care Act:

_“This decision is not the end of the fight against Obamacare ... We need a President who will repeal and replace Obamacare with a conservative solution.”_

And Mike Huckabee:

_“Today’s King v. Burwell decision ... is an out-of-control act of judicial tyranny.”_

And Marco Rubio:

_“I remain committed to repealing this bad law.”_

Almost every Republican running for president made an out-and-out promise to dismantle the Affordable Care Act if elected.

Let’s make sure they never get the chance.

**Hillary believes health care should be a universal human right, and she’ll never stop fighting to defend it. Are you with her? Chip in $1 today:**

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI5MjEyNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyNDg4NjQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Ann

Ann O'Leary
Senior Policy Advisor
Hillary for America

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just reply to this email with feedback -- we read everything, promise! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI5MjEyNTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyNDg4NjQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.

name: Governor Rick Perry
subject: Who?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perry for President, Inc
body:
| | **** Friend -

I'm sure you saw the news this morning. President Obama's namesake law - mistakes, delays and all - just survived another bruising lawsuit. **Who will be the one to repeal this law?** | Members of Congress talk about repealing it. The Supreme Court clearly won't invalidate it. **Only a conservative President will provide the leadership to repeal this disastrous law.
**
[**If elected, I 'll repeal every word of Obamacare but I need your support to make that a reality.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI5MjE5MDgS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NTgyNDk0MTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Liberals know that **millions of Americans lost their doctors** and **watch their premiums go up every year** , yet do nothing to fix the problem.

They told us at the time that we needed to pass Obamacare to find out what's in it! **Now, we know what 's inside - and it is expensive, intrusive and fatally flawed.**

Our next President owes it to the United States to tear out this law, root and branch. [**I want to be that President, but I need your help - chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can give today.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI5MjE5MDgS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NTgyNDk0MTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks for what you do -

Governor Rick Perry
**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI5MjE5MDgS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NTgyNDk0MTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI5MjE5MDgS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NTgyNDk0MTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
